blended.narrative: Sunshine Village is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.8 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,779 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 12°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
